name: Web Search
description: Generic web search for arbitrary queries. Use to discover presence across platforms (reviews, marketplaces, social links), competitors, funding/news, and region-specific platforms for any business worldwide. Returns top results with title/url/snippet.

queries.description: Multiple search queries separated by newlines. If provided, runs all and returns combined results.

maxResultsPerQuery.description: Max results per query when using queries (default: 6).

maxTotalResults.description: Max combined unique URLs to return across all queries (default: 40).

region.description: Optional region hint (e.g. 'in', 'us', 'uk'). Used only as a hint in heuristics.
